calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Omtion For Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-05-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT NANCY TAN'S Motion For Terminating Sanctions IS Transferred to Discovery calendar. This motion will be heard on the same date in Dept. 301 at 9:00 am. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

Defendant Nancy Tan'S Motion For Terminating Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-05-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Patricia J. Peterson, Esq. of the Law Offices of John A. Biard, Tel. 925.944.3225, for defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The party stipulated to the Pro Tem Judge. The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT NANCY TAN'S Motion For Terminating Sanctions is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem: Nils Rosenquest; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Discovery Responses
Off Calendar Oct-01-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances on this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows:
Defendant NANCY TAN's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses is GRANTED. Within 30 days Plaintiff Shirley Tene shall provide code-compliant verified responses to Defendant's Form Interrogatories-Limited Civil Cases, Set One; Defendant's Specially Prepared Interrogatories, Set One; Defendant's Request for Production of Documents, Set One; and Defendant's Request for Statement of Witnesses and Evidence - For Limited Civil Cases pursuant to C.C.P. Section 425.11. Order signed after court. Judge Pro Tem: Ernst A. Halperin; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
